headline: Simon Property Group Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) reported first-quarter 2026 results that exceeded its internal plan and raised its full-year real estate funds from operations guidance, citing stronger occupancy, higher shopper traffic and accelerating retailer sales across its portfolio.
